title: Labor Et Cura.
content:
Double double,
	    Toil and trouble.
	    Fire burn and
	    Caldron bubble.

	        Ingeminat labor,
	        Ingeminante cur�,
	        Cum flamma ardescit,
	        Aqua ebullitura.
meaning:
"Labor Et Cura." is a quintessential example of Jacob Bigelow's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
